none.justification: Answer A gives exactly the GT set: setGenericCommand directly, plus setCommand, setnxCommand, setexCommand, and psetexCommand via setGenericCommand. It also correctly excludes the msetGeneric/msetCommand/msetnx path via setKey(), though it does not explicitly mention every non-candidate the GT discusses.

ccodegraph.justification: Answer B gives exactly the five expected functions and distinguishes the direct setKeyByLink caller from the four setGenericCommand callers. Its extra tool-confidence details are not needed, but they do not add any false positive in src/t_string.c or miss the mset exclusion.

lsp.justification: Answer C matches the GT exactly: one direct caller, setGenericCommand, and the four callers of setGenericCommand with correct line evidence. It also explicitly excludes other plausible t_string.c candidates such as msetGenericCommand and getexCommand, so there is no scoring gap.
